1 #ETH = 1WETH and vice versa.

They can act as bridges between different blockchains.

If #BTC completes its Macro Double Bottom at the 200MA just before the Halving...

18. 

Once that #BTC rejection at crucial resistance occurs, BTC may retrace to the 200MA to complete its Macro Double Bottom

$BTC would rebound from the 200MA to challenge the crucial resistance

How long could that second challenge take?

Historically, it has taken 70-140 days https://t.co/cPAv4B0Gns

17.

If #BTC were to form its first bottom of the Macro Double Bottom at the 200 MA and repeat such a timeline...

Then $BTC could revisit the crucial resistance by late August 2022 at the earliest and January 2023 at the latest

That resistance will likely reject price however https://t.co/Ugc8YuBWGk

16.

When could a revisit of the key generational #BTC resistance take place?

In the past, it took $BTC anything between 63-196 days to form the first bottom of the Macro Double Bottom and then challenge the crucial respective resistance

#Crypto #Bitcoin https://t.co/DRGPssYJNV

15.

This of course assumes that the key #BTC generational resistance is the old ATH

Over time we may find out that the resistance may morph into a diagonal just like in 2017-2020, meaning that price will reject lower than at old ATH

At the moment old $BTC ATH is the resistance https://t.co/yC32lzyvFN

14.

And once #BTC revisits its crucial generational resistance and rejects there...

$BTC would revisit the 200MA once again to form its second bottom of the Macro Double Bottom

Thus, BTC's price trajectory over the next several months could look like this

#Crypto #Bitcoin https://t.co/az3UUKDEAa

13.

The crucial #BTC generational resistance in this cycle will likely be the old All Time High ($65K-$69K; red resistance)

History suggests that once $BTC forms its first Macro Bottom at the 200MA, price could then revisit the key resistance to reject there

#Crypto #Bitcoin https://t.co/geo4PqKE2K

12.

#BTC tends to meander between the 200MA support & key resistance

The first $BTC Macro Bottom at the 200MA enables a move to the key resistance where BTC rejects

BTC then returns to form the second Macro Bottom at the 200MA & then rallies upward to break that key resistance https://t.co/r5qo0VoPlS

11.

It's clear the #BTC 200MA is a key support for BTC reversals

Let's talk about the key resistances that need to be broken for a new macro uptrend to emerge

In 2015 this $BTC resistance was the horizontal red box

Between 2017-2020 this key resistance was the orange diagonal https://t.co/fHXQCMDFYI

10.

Of course there's a chance that #BTC could form a Macro Double Bottom at the 200MA post-Halving

After all, the March 2020 revisit of the $BTC 200MA occurred just before the May 2020 Halving

In any case, the second Double Bottom would precede strong upside after the Halving https://t.co/0J96NgBsHU

9.

If that's the case then the second bottom of the #BTC Macro Double Bottom could take place on the week of the next $BTC Halving in April 2024

So the first BTC Macro Double Bottom could form at around ~$23000 & then the second Macro DB could form at ~$41000 in two year's time https://t.co/F1CcAjXFGH

8.

Bearing in mind that a second bottom of the #BTC Macro Double Bottom takes 217 days longer to form compared to previous DBs...

If we keep this amount of time constant, that would suggest $BTC could perform its first Double Bottom at the 200MA within the next 3 weeks or so https://t.co/HTfrbY9UGr

7.

Mid-March 2024 is only 3 weeks away from the April 1st 2024 #BTC Halving

Historically Macro Double Bottoms have formed before the $BTC Halving event

However, there is reason to believe that this next Macro Double Bottom could form post-Halving

#Crypto #Bitcoin https://t.co/vAOTgveafC

6.

Let's assume for a moment that #BTC will reach the 200MA later today (~$23000)

If we add an extra 217 days for the second bottom of the $BTC Macro Double Bottom to form then that Macro DB will form in mid-March 2024

There's something very interesting about this

Here's why: https://t.co/dfy3mBE0iV

5.

Between 2018 and 2020, the second #BTC Macro Double Bottom formed at the 200MA within 455 days

Interestingly, it's almost as if the amount of time during which Macro Double Bottoms form at the 200MA has doubled

Or is extending by about 217 days...

$BTC #Crypto #Bitcoin https://t.co/C7V9ZvPOG8

Above all else however...

These #BTC Macro Double Bottoms at the 200-week MA appear to be spacing out over time

In 2015, the first Macro Double Bottom formed at the 200MA within 217 days

$BTC #Crypto #Bitcoin https://t.co/zrv00GsvJp

March 2020 showed that $BTC wicks below the 200MA can occur

The 2018 Range was half as volatile & lasted half the time compared to the 2015 Range

The second Macro Bottom occurred over a year later
